positive: Minimalist, highly stylized geometric mountain landscape composed of interlocking triangles and abstract natural forms. The primary color palette should be deep indigo, burnt sienna, and off-white, giving it a celestial, yet earthy feel. A lone, stylized silhouette of a soaring eagle is perched on a central peak, forming a strong, clean focal point. The design should utilize negative space effectively, allowing the colors and shapes to breathe, perfect for a repeatable print pattern. Graphic novel style meets Japanese Ukiyo-e woodcut aesthetic. Clean lines, high contrast, suitable for screen printing, vector art quality, symmetrical composition, high detail.
